name: @tootallnate/byaml
description: Parser for Nintendo's BYAML / BYML binary YAML format. Used across Wii U / Switch first-party games for AI rivalry tables, course parameters, layout configs, and most other game data tables. Decodes to a JavaScript object tree (with type-discriminated wrappers for u32 vs s32 vs u64 etc.).
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
